title: Help
description: Find guides, tutorials, and answers to help you get the most out of doseo.
noResults: No articles found matching your search.
tourWelcomeContent: This is your SEO monitoring dashboard. Let us show you around!
tourAddDomainContent: Start by adding a domain to monitor. Click here to add your first website.
tourAddKeywordsContent: Add the keywords you want to track. You can add them manually or use AI suggestions.
tourViewPositionsContent: Track your keyword positions over time. See rankings, changes, and trends.
tourCheckCompetitorsContent: Add competitors to compare their rankings with yours across all your keywords.
tourReportsNavContent: Access your reports section from the navigation menu.
tourGenerateReportContent: Create comprehensive SEO reports with customizable sections.
tourCustomizeReportContent: Choose which sections to include and customize the report appearance.
tourExportReportContent: Export reports as PDF, CSV, or share them with clients via a link.
tourOrgSettingsContent: Manage your organization details, billing, and subscription plan.
tourBrandingContent: Upload your logo and customize the appearance of shared reports.
tourTeamContent: Invite team members and manage their roles and permissions.
tourNotificationsContent: Configure which notifications you receive and how often.
